case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. VS. MEI L CHUNG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A. SERVED JUL-30-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, MEI L
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $270.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, MEI L
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585); ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (EVID 1550) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.
